concepts_used.title: 常微分方程建模基础
concepts_used.how_used: 将乘客离开列车、走向楼梯、上楼梯的过程建模为微分方程，描述各阶段人数变化率。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: This yields a differential equation for the rate of change in the population of the car, c. dc/dt is negative, as the population is always decreasing.

concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 使用NetLogo进行基于智能体的仿真，模拟乘客从列车到楼梯的微观行为，验证数学模型的解析结果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The computational model was a NetLogo program that modelled the time taken to completely empty a train station.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 改变楼梯宽度、楼梯数量、列车编组等参数，观察清空时间的变化，发现楼梯宽度是最敏感因素。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Modifying the variables represents changing the conditions in the station platform. As we initially expected, the width of the stairwell is the most significant factor that impacts the time.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出12条假设，每条附有合理性说明，如步行速度1.4 m/s、每人1秒通过车门等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 3: The walking speed of these passengers is 1.4 m/s. Justification: Though there are definitely variations between people, most people, especially walking with a crowd, walk at about the same average speed of 1.4 m/s [1].

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用示意图展示站台布局和车厢内部结构，辅助说明模型变量和乘客流动路径。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1: A Diagram of the Train Station

concepts_used.title: 梯度下降法
concepts_used.how_used: 未直接使用梯度下降，但通过调整变量组合（n,d）进行参数扫描，寻找最优列车编组，类似网格搜索。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: A standard train with 600 passengers was tested using (n,d) pairs of (8,15),(10,12),(12,10) and (15,8).

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要、引言（背景与问题重述）、假设、模型建立（数学与计算）、结果与灵敏度分析、结论与建议。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Introduction Background... Restatement of Problem... Assumptions and Justifications... Mathematical Model... Computational Model... Results... Conclusion
